name: apideck-erp
description: Unified ERP / accounting MCP connector via Apideck — one MCP URL, 20+ accounting systems (QuickBooks, Xero, NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Microsoft Dynamics, Zoho Books, MYOB, FreshBooks, …). Drop-in source for the GL_MCP_URL / SUBLEDGER_MCP_URL / NAV_MCP_URL slots used by gl-reconciler, month-end-closer, and statement-auditor.
